nasb.text: and do not turn aside from any of the words which I command you today, to the right or to the left, to go after other gods to serve them.

esv.text: and if you do not turn aside from any of the words that I command you today, to the right hand or to the left, to go after other gods to serve them.

cnv.text: 不可偏離我今日吩咐你的一切話，不偏左也不偏右，以致去隨從和事奉別的神。
